title: phleum montanum subsp. serrulatum
intro: Phleum montanum subsp. serrulatum, commonly known as mountain timothy or serrulate timothy grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Phleum montanum subsp. serrulatum include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting liver health. Herbal preparations of this plant may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
